password_mismatch: New password and confirm password do not match!
A hole absent in the PCB, affecting comp: A hole absent in the PCB, affecting component placement and electrical continuity.
High density of modern PCBs makes detect: High density of modern PCBs makes detection difficult.
Lighting and contrast issues obscure vis: Lighting and contrast issues obscure visibility.
Small holes are hard to distinguish in p: Small holes are hard to distinguish in packed boards.
Small, irregular nicks along PCB edges d: Small, irregular nicks along PCB edges due to incomplete etching or milling issues.
Subtle defects are hard to distinguish f: Subtle defects are hard to distinguish from acceptable edges.
Complex PCB shapes make detection harder: Complex PCB shapes make detection harder.
Automated detection struggles with minor: Automated detection struggles with minor edge variations.
Thin copper protrusions forming along tr: Thin copper protrusions forming along traces, leading to potential short circuits.
Complex designs make distinguishing defe: Complex designs make distinguishing defects harder.
Automated inspection may misclassify spu: Automated inspection may misclassify spurs as normal traces.
Unintended copper remnants left after et: Unintended copper remnants left after etching, causing possible short circuits.
Difficult to differentiate from intended: Difficult to differentiate from intended traces in dense designs.
Lighting and material variations obscure: Lighting and material variations obscure visibility.
Microscopic holes in copper plating that: Microscopic holes in copper plating that can compromise PCB reliability.
Extremely small size makes detection dif: Extremely small size makes detection difficult.
Hard to differentiate from normal surfac: Hard to differentiate from normal surface imperfections.
Unintended connections between conductiv: Unintended connections between conductive paths leading to electrical failure.
Can be caused by design flaws, manufactu: Can be caused by design flaws, manufacturing errors, or contamination.
Difficult to detect in automated inspect: Difficult to detect in automated inspections.
Overlapping traces and misplaced vias in: Overlapping traces and misplaced vias increase occurrence.
A connection that has not been properly: A connection that has not been properly soldered, leading to intermittent faults.
scan_description: Press on “SCAN” to go to the camera and scan a new PCB
gallery_description: Press on “GALLERY” to choose a photo of a PCB from your gallery to scan it.
history_description: View previously scanned images and their results.
settings_description: Modify your preferences and app settings.
